title: Description won't expand in Information Widget
excerpt: I’ve added the Information Widget to my Monday task and have only checked “Description” to show up.  No matter how big I make the widget or even dock it, the copy will not stay expanded.  I’m using the Monday desktop app…

posts.author: chippy11 (Lynn Caiazza)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve added the Information Widget to my Monday task and have only checked “Description” to show up. No matter how big I make the widget or even dock it, the copy will not stay expanded. I’m using the Monday desktop app. When I hover over it, the copy will pop-up, but that kind of defeats the purpose.

Screenshot 2024-10-02 at 9.31.36 AM1422×458 38.3 KB

Screenshot 2024-10-02 at 9.31.19 AM1434×1192 49.2 KB
